---
title: "Downloads"
---

# Downloads {.unnumbered}

You can download the full book or individual chapters as standalone PDF documents below.

## Full Book

[Download Full Book (PDF)](../Capstone.pdf){.btn .btn-primary .btn-lg role="button"}

---

## Individual Chapters

If you only need a specific section, select a chapter below:

* [GitHub Setup](../standalone-pdfs/github.pdf)
* [Project Proposal](../standalone-pdfs/proposal.pdf)
* [Python Testing](../standalone-pdfs/test_python.pdf)
* [Interactive Python Notebook Part 1] (../standalone-pdfs/ipynb_part1.pdf)

::: {.callout-note}
These standalone PDFs are automatically updated every time the team pushes new code to GitHub.
:::
